headline: Form 6 Enrollment Collapses 35% as Students Seek Alternatives
context: STPM-track Form 6 enrollment fell 35% from 2020 to 2025 as students choose matriculation, polytechnics, or private paths.

cards.big: Form 6 enrollment dropped from 92,000 in 2020 to 60,000 in 2025
cards.sub: STPM's reputation as harder path with less reward drives student flight

cards.big: STPM failure rate of 38% compares to matriculation failure rate of only 5%
cards.sub: Difficulty disparity without proportional recognition deters rational students

cards.big: 1,200 Form 6 teaching positions may become redundant if enrollment trends continue
cards.sub: Teacher redeployment challenges emerge as Form 6 programs shrink

cards.big: Cambridge A-Levels achieved by Malaysian private students carry greater university recognition
cards.sub: International qualifications are preferred by both local and foreign universities

cards.big: Students abandoning Form 6 are making logical choices in an illogical system
Should Malaysia merge STPM and matriculation into a single national pre-university qualification
